creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 193034
svn diff for deskutils/gruler

Hello,
I just discovered that deskutils/gruler had been tagged BROKEN
~4 mos ago, because amdmi3 said he got a 403. I have no idea
how/why he got that, nor could I find evidence in the logs
indicating a problem. I just built it on one of my boxes, and
everything worked as expected (didn't use distcache). I also
had no trouble downloading it to my cell phone. Weird.
Anyway. This pr(1) removes BROKEN.
While here; I might also indicate I have newer source for
this project (from the original author(s)). The files are
located in the same location as the source for Gruler.
Their names are: screenruler-0.85.tar.gz , and
screenruler-0.9.6.tar.gz
Maybe they can help to update this port?

Changes included in the svn diff file attached to this pr:
Remove BROKEN
Bump PORTREVISION to indicate this change

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
